quotes.text: Crimes? Our crime was to sacrifice everything to save this world.
We fought for Illidan, you imprisoned the world's villains here for all eternity. And then you imprisoned us.
You dare speak of sacrifice to me?
I gave up my flesh, my soul; my people shun me as a freak.
I will serve MY people, the exiled and the reviled.
I will slay you and your kin; and when I'm done I will fulfill the dreams of my mentor.
It's so good to fight again.
My blades hunger.
Anger, Hate, Rage! These will fuel me with the power I crave!
I need no blade to defeat you.
I will cast you all aside...
Play with fire and you'll get burned.
My hatred flows through me.
My power's wane. I must have more!
Death is weakness leaving the universe.
More power for my blades.
I cannot be stopped.
My power... Wasn't enough?
Ooohh... New subjects.
Your souls are mine.
Let's see what's behind door number...
A pity.
Death becomes you.
Playtime has ended.
How terribly disappointing.
So... long... where is my Lord of Fire, why does he not answer my call?
Your bones will blacken, your life extinguished.
We give rise to flame.
Your flesh will know the sweet caress of fire.
Fire has a life of its own.
Flame! Death!
So... C... Cold.
You cannot contain these flames!
The fire consumes all!
More fuel for our fire!
I will burn this prison to the ground!
I am... Extinguished.
